mapper.select: select case when gender=1 then '男性员工' when gender=2 then '女性员工' end as name, count(*) as value from emp where gender is not null group by gender
SELECT job, COUNT(*) AS count FROM emp WHERE job IS NOT NULL GROUP BY job ORDER BY job

select case when degree=1 then '初中' when degree=2 then '高中' when degree=3 then '大专' when degree=4 then '本科' when degree=5 then '硕士' end as name, count(*) as value from student where degree is not null group by degree order by degree
SELECT c.name AS clazzName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM student s LEFT JOIN clazz c ON s.clazz_id = c.id WHERE c.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.id
